4-ingredient-lemon-cookie-recipe-lezzet.name: 4 Ingredient Lemon Cookie Recipe
instructions: 1. Tüm malzemeleri yoğurun.
2. Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar alıp yuvarlayın.
3. 170°C fırında 12–14 dakika pişirin.
4. Soğuyunca üzerine pudra şekeri serpebilirsiniz.

4-ingredient-no-bake-cocoa-pudding-recip.name: 4 Ingredient No-bake Cocoa Pudding Recipe
instructions: 1. Süt ile tereyağını küçük bir tencerede birlikte ısıtın; karışımın oldukça sıcak olması önemlidir.
2. Kakaolu bisküvileri iri parçalar halinde bölerek mutfak robotuna aktarın, ardından çikolataları ekleyin.
3. Isınan sütlü karışımı robota dökün ve tüm malzemeleri pürüzsüz, kremsi bir kıvam alana kadar çekin.
4. Hazırladığınız karışımı servis kaplarına paylaştırın, üzerine rendelenmiş çikolata serperek servis edin.
5.  Afiyet olsun.

4-ingredient-strawberry-cake-recipe-lezz.name: 4 Ingredient Strawberry Cake Recipe
instructions: 1. Yumurtaları ve şekeri, karışım beyazlaşıp köpürene kadar mikserle çırpın.
2. Unu eleyerek karışıma yavaşça ekleyin ve spatula ile nazikçe karıştırın.
3. Doğranmış çilekleri ekleyip hafifçe karıştırın.
4. Yağlanmış veya yağlı kağıt serilmiş kek kalıbına dökün.
5. Önceden ısıtılmış 170 derecelik fırında yaklaşık 30–35 dakika pişirin.
6. Kürdan testi yaparak pişip pişmediğini kontrol edin.
7.  Soğuduktan sonra servis edin.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

4-types-of-freezer-cookies-recipe-with-o.name: 4 Types Of Freezer Cookies Recipe With One Dough
4-types-of-freezer-cookies-recipe-with-o.original_name: Tek Hamurla 4 Çeşit Buzluk Kurabiyesi Tarifi

ingredients.item: Fındıklı tarçınlı – 1 çay bardağı iri kıyılmış fındık + 1 tatlı kaşığı tarçın
Portakallı haşhaşlı – 1 yemek kaşığı portakal kabuğu rendesi + 1 tatlı kaşığı haşhaş tohumu

instructions: 1. Tereyağı ve pudra şekerini krema kıvamına gelene kadar çırpın.
2. Yumurtayı ekleyin, ardından vanilin ve kabartma tozunu katın.
3. Unu kontrollü ekleyerek yumuşak ama toparlanan bir hamur yoğurun.
4. Hamuru 4 parçaya ayırıp her birine farklı ek malzemeyi ilave edin.
5. Rulo şeklinde sarıp buzdolabı poşetine yerleştirin, derin dondurucuda saklayın.
6. Pişireceğiniz zaman çıkarıp 5 dakika bekletin, dilimleyip 180°C’de 15–17 dakika pişirin ve servis edin.
7.  Afiyet olsun.

4-3-2-1-spice-rub.name: 4-3-2-1 Spice Rub
instructions: Combine salt, brown sugar, paprika, and cayenne in a small bowl or resealable container.
Do Ahead: Rub can be made 2 months ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

4-ingredient-green-smoothie-bowl.name: 4-ingredient Green Smoothie Bowl

ingredients.prep: milk or dairy-free milk of your choice

instructions: Halve your kiwi and use a spoon to scoop out the pulp. Optional: Freeze kiwi pulp and peeled banana for a creamier and thicker smoothie.
Add all ingredients to a blender and blend until smooth.
Pour into a bowl with your favorite toppings and serve!

4-ingredient-strawberry-vinaigrette.name: 4-ingredient Strawberry Vinaigrette
instructions: Combine strawberry purée, vinegar, and honey in a mini blender; blend until smooth. Pour into a glass container; stir in poppy seeds.
Set aside at room temperature for flavors to meld, about 1 hour, then refrigerate.

4-ingredient-stuffed-steak.name: 4-ingredient Stuffed Steak

ingredients.item: Mccormick® grill mates® sweet & smoky rub

instructions: Lay the skirt steak strips on a cutting board and cover with plastic wrap. Use a heavy skillet or food mallet to pound each strip to less than ¼-inch thickness.

Generously season the pounded steaks on both sides with McCormick® Grill Mates® Sweet & Smoky Rub. Place 5 slices pepper Jack cheese on each steak. Tightly roll up each steak lengthwise to create pinwheels.
Tie butcher twine around each pinwheel about 2 inches apart from one another. Slice each pinwheel in half lengthwise.
Preheat the grill to a two-zone high heat temperature, around 204°C (200°C).
Sear the pinwheels on the hot side of the grill for about 2 minutes per side, or until a nice crust develops.
Move the pinwheels to the cooler side of the grill and continue cooking for 8-10 more minutes, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of each pinwheel reaches 49°C (49°C).
Remove the pinwheels from the grill and let rest for 10 minutes before removing the twine and serving.
Enjoy!

4-layer-strawberry-affogato.name: 4-layer Strawberry Affogato

ingredients.item: Scoops strawberry gelato or ice creams

instructions: Heat the white chocolate and coconut oil in a small pot over low heat, stirring with a spatula, until melted, about 3 minutes.
Pour the melted white chocolate mixture into the bottom of a chilled dessert bowl. Top with the diced strawberries. Top with the strawberry gelato, and use a large spoon to smooth over the top.
Spoon out a hole from the center of the gelato (about the size of a heaping tablespoon).

Hold the whole strawberry in your hand. Using a small pairing knife and starting at the pointed tip of the strawberry, make slices down just before the knife reaches the stem, being sure not to cut through, then fan the strawberry out. Add to the side of the bowl.
Arrange the freeze-dried strawberries on top of the gelato.
Pour the espresso in the middle of the ice cream until it reaches the top.
Enjoy!

40-clove-garlic-bread.name: 40-clove Garlic Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C). Place a sheet of foil on a small baking sheet and line another baking sheet with parchment paper.

Cut ½ inch off the tops of the garlic heads and place on the baking sheet with the foil. Drizzle the garlic with the olive oil and season with 1 teaspoon salt and the black pepper. Place the tops back on each garlic bulb. Bring up the corners of the foil around the garlic, then roll closed to form a tight packet. Place in the oven and roast until the garlic is caramelized, about 45 minutes. Remove from the oven and let sit for 30 minutes, until cool enough to handle. Leave the oven on.
Unwrap the foil packet and squeeze the heads to release the roasted garlic cloves into a medium bowl. Mash with a fork until a thick paste forms (some chunks are okay).
Add the butter, parsley, oregano, and remaining ½ teaspoon salt and stir to combine.

Using a serrated knife, carefully cut the bread into 1-inch-thick (2.54 cm) slices, stopping ½ inch (1.24 cm) from the bottom of the loaf to keep intact. Turn the loaf 90° and repeat cutting in the opposite direction.
Place the loaf on the parchment-lined baking sheet and stuff the mozzarella between the bread slices. Spread the roasted garlic butter over the entire loaf.
Place the loaf into the oven and bake until the cheese is melted and the top of the loaf is golden brown and crispy, 25–30 minutes.
Remove the loaf from the oven and transfer to a serving platter. Grate the Parmesan cheese directly over the top. Serve hot.
Enjoy!

40-clove-garlic-chicken.name: 40-clove Garlic Chicken
instructions: Pre-heat the oven to 180°C (177°C)
Season the chicken with the salt, pepper and mixed herbs. Set aside.
Heat some oil in a large pan and sear the chicken for about 10-15 minutes evenly on each side, until golden brown.
Take the chicken out and set aside.
Add the shallots and cook down in the remaining juices for about 5 minutes over a low-medium heat.
Add the garlic cloves and gently cook them for about 2 minutes.
Pour in the vermouth or white wine and gently cook so that it reduces slightly.
Add the chicken, parsley sprigs and tarragon, followed by the chicken stock.
Bake in the oven for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve with crusty bread and vegetables of your choice.
Enjoy!

40-minute-cinnamon-rolls.name: 40-minute Cinnamon Rolls
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190°C). Grease a 9-inch square baking dish with nonstick spray.

Make the dough: In a large bowl, combine the flour, milk, melted butter, egg, granulated sugar, baking powder, salt, and yeast. Mix with a rubber spatula until a shaggy dough forms. Turn out onto a clean surface and knead for about 1 minute, until mostly smooth and the dough springs back when poked. Return the dough to the bowl, cover with a kitchen towel, and let rest while you make the filling.
Make the filling: In a medium bowl, mix together the brown sugar, melted butter, and cinnamon until combined.
Roll the dough out on a lightly floured surface to a 12 x 16-inch rectangle.
Spread the filling evenly over the dough. Starting with a the long edge, tightly roll the dough into a log. Cut the log into 9 even pieces.
Transfer the cinnamon rolls to the prepared baking pan. Bake for 25 minutes, until light golden brown around the edges.
While the cinnamon rolls bake, make the frosting: In a medium bowl, combine the cream cheese, powdered sugar, and vanilla. Beat with an electric hand mixer on medium speed until smooth and creamy.
Let the cinnamon rolls cool for 10 minutes, then cover with the frosting.
Enjoy!

4th-of-july-dump-cake.name: 4th Of July Dump Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).
Layer cherry pie filling, blueberries, cake mix, melted butter, and nuts in a 9x12-inch baking pan.
Bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes.

4th-of-july-fruit-kabobs.name: 4th Of July Fruit Kabobs
instructions: Slice watermelon in thick slices. Cut out stars using a cookie cutter.
Skewer about 15 blueberries on a wooden skewer and 1 watermelon star on top. Repeat with remaining ingredients.

4th-of-july-fruit-salad.name: 4th Of July Fruit Salad
instructions: Combine cantaloupe, watermelon, blueberries, and strawberries in a large bowl; stir well.

4th-of-july-patriotic-brownies.name: 4th Of July Patriotic Brownies

ingredients.item: Red and blue candy-coated milk chocolate pieces (such as m&m's®)

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a 9-inch square baking pan with parchment paper; grease parchment paper with vegetable oil.

Place butter in a microwave-safe bowl. Microwave until melted; stir until smooth. Stir sugar, cocoa powder, water, and vanilla into melted butter until well blended; beat in eggs until mixture is shiny. Quickly stir in flour until thoroughly combined. Pour batter into the prepared baking pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into center comes out clean, 25 to 35 minutes. Cool at room temperature for at least 30 minutes. Transfer to the refrigerator to cool completely, about 30 minutes more.

Place ½ cup white chocolate chips in a microwave-safe bowl. Microwave until melted, 1 to 1 ½ minutes; stir until well blended, smooth, and yogurt-like in consistency. Stir in red food coloring until reaches desired shade. Spread red-colored chocolate in a stripe over top; sprinkle with 1 tablespoon red and blue candy-coated chocolate pieces before it hardens.

Place ½ cup white chocolate chips in a microwave-safe bowl. Microwave until melted, 1 to 1 ½ minutes; stir until well blended, smooth, and yogurt-like in consistency. Stir in blue food coloring until reaches desired shade. Spread blue-colored chocolate in a second stripe over top; sprinkle with 1 tablespoon candy-coated chocolate pieces.

Place remaining ½ cup white chocolate chips in a microwave-safe bowl. Microwave until melted, 1 to 1 ½ minutes; stir until well blended, smooth, and yogurt-like in consistency. Spread white chocolate in a third stripe over top; sprinkle with remaining 1 tablespoon candy-coated chocolate pieces.
Refrigerate brownies to allow chocolate to harden, at least 30 minutes.
